changelog: LITE LIVE TV — Categories sidebar restored. Same UX as Pro: a left-side scrollable list of all live categories, click/focus a category to load its channels in the right pane. Lazy fetch — categories load instantly, channels of a category load only the first time you select it (then cached for the session).
Fixed Search 'crash' (was the same v419 LazyRow Bundle-key bug, already patched in v1.44.20). Anyone still on v1.44.19 needs to OTA-update.
